title: habenaria fragrans
intro: Habenaria fragrans, commonly known as the Fragrant Habenaria, is a type of orchid native to tropical Asia. It is a terrestrial orchid that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Habenaria fragrans include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the roots of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
